docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION - DEPT. OF HUMAN SERVICES AS TO DEFENDANT WASHINGTON, LAKENA F. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-29-2001 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
